name: December 2025 Dinner
description: Year-end reflections on AI consulting models, economic impact of AI and the rise of robotics.

topics.text: AI Consulting models — 80/20 rule, cloud vs local deployment; bigger projects in 2026
Economic Impact of AI — capitalism, inequality, automation; "AI 2027" reading
Rise of Robotics — elderly care, healthcare, manufacturing pressures
Expert Systems vs LLMs — chess at 3,500 Elo vs LLMs at 800; right tool for the job
AI-Generated Code challenges — duplication; need strong foundations; MCP + Figma
Medical Transcription — human review augmentation and terminology errors
Deep Research and News — parallel agents for synthesis; ESG signals 300% gain
ARC-AGI and Playgroup — Ian's deep-dive events; ARC-AGI 2026 spatial reasoning challenge
